name: plumb
description: Evidence-gated completion at the harness level — when a turn edits code and claims it works but never ran a check, plumb asks it to prove it before finishing.

armed.title: Arm the completion gate
armed.description: When on, plumb blocks a turn that edited code and claimed success without running any test, build, or run command. Off (default) is observe-only: it records what it would have blocked to a log, without ever interrupting a turn.
